title: nepeta gontscharovii
intro: Nepeta gontscharovii, also known as Gontscharov's catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Nepeta gontscharovii include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and colds. Traditionally, Nepeta gontscharovii is used to make herbal teas and infusions, as well as being added to topical creams and ointments for its soothing properties.
